title: Tool Invocation Record
description: Captures a single tool/function call made by an agent within a pipeline. Primary EU AI Act mapping: Art. 12(2)(c), 12(3)(a), 12(3)(b), 12(3)(c).

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record. Schema metadata; no direct Act mapping.

record_type.description: Discriminator identifying this record as a Tool Invocation Record.

pipeline_id.description: Identifier of the pipeline this record belongs to. EU AI Act Art. 12(2)(c) — supports operational monitoring (Art. 26(5)) by linking records to a pipeline run.

session_id.description: Identifier of the execution session within the pipeline. EU AI Act Art. 12(2)(c) — supports operational monitoring.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier of the agent node that issued this tool call. EU AI Act Art. 12(2)(c) — supports operational monitoring by attributing the tool call to its calling agent.

tool_name.description: Stable identifier of the tool/function invoked (e.g. 'web_search', 'sql_query'). Schema metadata supporting traceability under Art. 12(2)(c).

tool_version.description: Specific version of the tool/function (e.g. '1.4.0', git SHA, API version). Required for drift detection across deployments under the same Art. 12(2)(b) rationale that justifies model_version on Agent Step Records.

timestamp_start.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp marking the start of this tool invocation. EU AI Act Art. 12(3)(a) — record start time of each use (biometric minimum, applied universally per thesis policy).

timestamp_end.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp marking the end of this tool invocation. EU AI Act Art. 12(3)(a) — record end time of each use. Constraint timestamp_end >= timestamp_start is not expressible in JSON Schema 2020-12; enforced at the unit-test layer (tests/test_schemas.py).

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical tool input (arguments). EU AI Act Art. 12(3)(c) — record input data that produced a result. Hashing rather than storing raw content satisfies GDPR data minimisation.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical tool output. EU AI Act Art. 12(2)(c) — supports operational monitoring by enabling integrity verification of tool output.

reference_data_id.description: Identifier of any reference dataset/database consulted by the tool (e.g. corpus version, API endpoint version). EU AI Act Art. 12(3)(b) — record the reference database consulted (biometric minimum, applied universally where relevant). Null when the tool consults no external reference data.

parent_record_id.description: record_id of the immediately preceding record in the pipeline (inter-record linkage). Typically the Agent Step Record that issued this tool call. Null only if this is the first record in the pipeline (rare for tool invocations). Schema metadata supporting the ordered record chain referenced by Art. 12(2) traceability.

uuid.description: RFC 4122 UUID string in lowercase hex (canonical form for the protocol).

sha256_hex.description: SHA-256 digest as 64 lowercase hex characters.
